title: Mobile App Board Views Problem

posts.author: dwadsworth (Dustin Wadsworth)
posts.cookedHtml:
The mobile app needs an improvement on board views - the app always seems to open to the MAIN TABLE view at the start of a new session.

We have board default views which are created but they don’t work as expected on Monday.

We really need to:

  1. ensure the board default view loads FIRST for all of our mobile users.
  2. We should be able to apply board view permissions for each user - meaning we create a board default view and assign specific users to ONLY be able to see that view - thus hiding the main table view or any others from them.

This would be a far better user experience.

posts.author: Chris2 (Chris)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes this is extremely frustrating. The vast majority of our staff works on a phone or iPAD. User adoption suffers…
